summary: TRUST-BOUNDARY: Public Plugin.checkCapability API bypasses CapabilityId branded type (line 487 accepts string, casts as any)
detail: Plugin.Interface.checkCapability typed as (pluginId: string, capability: string). Implementation at line 487 casts `capability as any` before passing to enforcer's checkCapability which requires CapabilityId. The isValidCapabilityId guard only protects HookDispatchGuard internal path, not the public Plugin.checkCapability API. Any external caller can pass arbitrary strings bypassing the type guard.

summary: TRUST-BOUNDARY: Zero test coverage for all 6 trust-boundary specific functions
detail: No tests exist for isValidCapabilityId(), decodeAuthDataPerEntry(), persistCrash(), persistSuccess(), HookDispatchGuard.shouldDispatch(), or DeviceCodeResponseSchema validation. All trust-boundary functions have 0% automated test coverage.
file_path: packages/opencode/test/ (no matches for any trust-boundary function)
